purpose: Read-only data-feasibility probe: backtest vs forward access for E1/E2/E3.

a_without_token.question: How much historical earnings data is reachable WITHOUT MKK_VYK_TOKEN?

notes: KAP-4.0 cutoff: disclosures below this index are html-only (no XBRL) -> historical earnings depth is bounded below by KAP-4.0 (~2020/21+), not 2019.
MKK_VYK_TOKEN absent -> historical earnings fall back to yfinance fundamentals, where announcement dates are unreliable (look-ahead risk).

a_without_token.verdict: WITHOUT token: fetch_fr_history returns EMPTY (no XBRL earnings). Historical E1 backtest falls back to yfinance fundamentals only.

b_kap4_depth.question: KAP-4.0 cutoff -> real historical depth (2020/21+ vs 2019)?
b_kap4_depth.verdict: disclosureIndex below the cutoff is html-only (no XBRL). KAP 4.0 platform launched ~2021 -> XBRL earnings depth ~2021+, NOT 2019. Exact calendar date of the cutoff index requires the live API.

c_yfinance_announcement_lookahead.question: yfinance fallback announcement-date reliability (look-ahead risk)?
c_yfinance_announcement_lookahead.verdict: quarterly_income_stmt gives PERIOD-END dates only; announcement comes ~6-10 weeks later. If get_earnings_dates is empty/unreliable for .IS, using period-end as the event date is a SEVERE look-ahead error. Forward recorder avoids this entirely (real-time publication date).

d_e2_e3_and_forward.question: E2/E3 data-path? + which event type is reachable TODAY (auth-free)?

forward_kap_sample.title: THY Türbülansa Girdi ve Yılın En Kötü Performansını Gösterdi - AirportHaber

d_e2_e3_and_forward.forward_verdict: Auth-free KAP/news feed reachable -> forward E1/E3 capture can start today WITHOUT token (recent-only; WAF-fragile -> handled gracefully). This is the bypass for the token bottleneck.
